name: procurement managers in mid-sized companies processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For procurement managers in mid-sized companies processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual scorecard creation causes late performance reviews. We automate scorecard generation instead of manual scorecard creation using spreadsheets.
target_audience: procurement managers in mid-sized companies processing 10–20 invoices/month
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking vendor performance consistently.
